summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SmartMeal AI meal planning app. Backend CRUD operations working well (83.3% success rate), frontend UI fully functional with excellent orange/green theme implementation. Critical AI integration issue identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to invalid model name 'gpt-5.2-mini'
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core AI recipe suggestion feature - users cannot get meal recommendations
critical_bugs.error_details: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Invalid model name passed in model=gpt-5.2-mini

security_issues.issue: Inconsistent authentication behavior - sometimes returns 200 without proper token
security_issues.impact: Potential security vulnerability in auth validation

integration_issues.issue: AI recipe suggestions fail due to backend 500 error
integration_issues.user_impact: Users see 'No Recipes Found' instead of AI-generated recipes

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct orange/green theme
Google OAuth login redirects to auth.emergentagent.com correctly
Dashboard loads for authenticated users with proper greeting
Pantry CRUD operations (add, edit, delete ingredients) working perfectly
Family CRUD operations (add, edit, delete members) working perfectly
Session-based authentication working for protected routes
UI components and forms are fully functional
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix AI model name in backend server.py - change 'gpt-5.2-mini' to correct model name (likely 'gpt-4o-mini' or similar). Also investigate authentication inconsistency in /api/auth/me endpoint.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All UI/UX working, only AI integration affected by backend issue)
